name: HellaSwag
selection_rationale: Cross-dimensional benchmark; adversarial filtering example; expected Tier C due to saturation (foundational case).

name: HHH
selection_rationale: Foundational alignment benchmark; only General Alignment subcategory in corpus; criterion C1 (dimensional coverage).

name: TruthfulQA
selection_rationale: Highly adopted truthfulness benchmark; expected Tier A; criterion C2 (frontier adoption).

name: MMLU
selection_rationale: Foundational general knowledge; deliberately included as Tier C candidate (saturation + contamination); criterion C5 (BQAI variation).

name: BIG-bench
selection_rationale: Foundational holistic suite (200+ tasks); criterion C1 (D6 coverage) and C3 (temporal diversity).

name: GSM8K
selection_rationale: Foundational mathematical reasoning; deliberately included as Tier C candidate (saturation + Zhang et al. 2024 contamination evidence).

name: HumanEval
selection_rationale: Foundational code generation benchmark; near-saturated; criterion C5 (BQAI variation, expected Tier B).

name: MMLU-Pro
selection_rationale: Contamination-resistant successor to MMLU; criterion C2 (universal frontier adoption).

name: GPQA Diamond
selection_rationale: PhD-validated, Google-proof; cross-dimensional (Scientific + General Knowledge); criterion C2.

name: MT-Bench
selection_rationale: Foundational LLM-as-judge dialogue evaluation; criterion C2 (high adoption).

name: Chatbot Arena
selection_rationale: Foundational human-preference dialogue benchmark; criterion C2.

name: AgentBench
selection_rationale: Foundational multi-environment agentic evaluation; criterion C1 (D4 coverage).

name: GAIA
selection_rationale: General AI assistants benchmark; criterion C1 (D4 coverage) and C4 (Emerging track).

name: WebArena
selection_rationale: Realistic web environments; criterion C1 (D4 coverage); paper §8.4 explicitly identifies this as critical.

name: SWE-bench Verified
selection_rationale: Human-validated software engineering; criterion C2 (frontier adoption) and C5 (expected Tier A).

name: LiveCodeBench
selection_rationale: Contamination-resistant code generation; criterion C2 and C5 (Tier A).

name: LiveBench
selection_rationale: Rolling contamination-resistant holistic suite; criterion C5 (Tier A) and C2.

name: HELM
selection_rationale: Gold standard holistic evaluation; criterion C5 (Tier A) and C2.

name: C-Eval
selection_rationale: Chinese multi-discipline; criterion C1 (only multilingual representative in sample) and C4.

name: MMMU
selection_rationale: Foundational multimodal knowledge; criterion C2 (frontier adoption) and addresses §8.2 multimodal gap.

name: MathVista
selection_rationale: Multimodal mathematical reasoning; addresses paper's §8.2 underrepresentation concern.

name: OlympiadBench
selection_rationale: Fills the intermediate difficulty gap identified in §8.1 (between MATH-500 saturation and FrontierMath intractability).

name: FrontierMath
selection_rationale: Research-frontier mathematics; criterion C4 (Emerging track) and unsaturated benchmark.

name: AIME 2025
selection_rationale: Competition mathematics 2025; criterion C3 (most recent temporal point) and C4.

name: HLE
selection_rationale: Premier discriminative benchmark (35.8-point spread); criterion C2 and C5 (Tier A/B candidate).

name: BBQ
selection_rationale: Foundational bias benchmark; only Bias and Fairness subcategory representative; criterion C1 (D5 coverage).

name: HarmBench
selection_rationale: Standardized red-teaming framework; addresses paper's §8.5 safety transparency gap.

name: SafetyBench
selection_rationale: Multi-category safety; bilingual coverage (English/Chinese); criterion C1 and C4.

name: CLadder
selection_rationale: Only causal reasoning benchmark with significant adoption; addresses §8.1 causal underrepresentation.

name: OmniAI OCR
selection_rationale: Document processing; criterion C1 (D4 coverage) and unique subcategory representation.
